< Home >

GET restapi/personal/workload/courses/{studentId}/v1?PageIndex={PageIndex}&PageSize={PageSize}

Gets a list of courses with corresponding workload for a student.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
studentId

The student's PersonID

 integer

Required
PageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

This method returns a collection of entity . Each entity contains the details of a student and their workload in courses.

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.CourseWithWorkload
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.CourseWithWorkload

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "EntityArray": [
    {
      "CourseId": 1,
      "Title": "sample string 2",
      "Workload": {
        "FinishedAssignments": 1,
        "TotalAvailableAssignments": 2,
        "FinishedWorkload": 3,
        "TotalAvailableWorkload": 4
      },
      "CanAccessAssignmentList": true
    },
    {
      "CourseId": 1,
      "Title": "sample string 2",
      "Workload": {
        "FinishedAssignments": 1,
        "TotalAvailableAssignments": 2,
        "FinishedWorkload": 3,
        "TotalAvailableWorkload": 4
      },
      "CanAccessAssignmentList": true
    }
  ],
  "Total": 1,
  "CurrentPageIndex": 2,
  "PageSize": 3
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray>
    <CourseWithWorkload>
      <CanAccessAssignmentList>true</CanAccessAssignmentList>
      <CourseId>1</CourseId>
      <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      <Workload>
        <FinishedAssignments>1</FinishedAssignments>
        <FinishedWorkload>3</FinishedWorkload>
        <TotalAvailableAssignments>2</TotalAvailableAssignments>
        <TotalAvailableWorkload>4</TotalAvailableWorkload>
      </Workload>
    </CourseWithWorkload>
    <CourseWithWorkload>
      <CanAccessAssignmentList>true</CanAccessAssignmentList>
      <CourseId>1</CourseId>
      <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      <Workload>
        <FinishedAssignments>1</FinishedAssignments>
        <FinishedWorkload>3</FinishedWorkload>
        <TotalAvailableAssignments>2</TotalAvailableAssignments>
        <TotalAvailableWorkload>4</TotalAvailableWorkload>
      </Workload>
    </CourseWithWorkload>
  </EntityArray>
  <PageSize>3</PageSize>
  <Total>1</Total>
</EntityList>
